name: wacv-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for WACV submissions: applications-vs-algorithms track choice, the two-round Revise-and-Resubmit review model, OpenReview submission checks, Round 1 rebuttals, reproducibility and artifacts, supplementary material, IEEE Xplore and CVF open-access camera-ready, writing style, related work, experiments, and campaign workflow. Grounded in the official WACV 2027 Call for Papers, Author Guidelines, OpenReview groups, and WACV 2026 pages cross-checked on 2026-07-09.
